items.title: Introducing GPT-4.1 in the API | OpenAI
items.author: openai.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been active with model releases in early 2026. The headline release is GPT-4.1, introduced via the API and ChatGPT in April 2026. GPT-4.1 is optimized for coding tasks and excels at precise instruction-following and web development compared to GPT-4o. It comes in three tiers: GPT-4.1 (flagship), GPT-4.1 mini (fast and efficient, replacing GPT-4o mini), and GPT-4.1 nano (optimized for high-volume, low-latency tasks). Access is rolling out to Plus, Pro, Team, Enterprise, and Edu users v

items.title: OpenAI Takes on Google With New AI Model Aimed at Drug Discovery - Bloomberg
items.author: www.bloomberg.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been actively publishing research in early 2026 across several domains. Most notably, on April 16, 2026, OpenAI introduced GPT-Rosalind, a frontier reasoning model aimed at accelerating drug discovery, genomics analysis, and protein reasoning, with early access granted to partners like Amgen, Moderna, and the Allen Institute. Alongside this, OpenAI released a labor market study showing that workers in AI-exposed jobs are already using AI for 3x as many tasks as less-exposed workers, b

items.title: Model Release Notes — OpenAI Help Center
items.author: help.openai.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been active with major announcements throughout early 2026. In April 2026, OpenAI raised $122 billion to accelerate its next phase of AI development, acquired TBPN (a daily tech talk show), and launched its Trusted Access for Cyber (TAC) program — scaling defensive cybersecurity access to thousands of verified defenders alongside a new GPT-5.4-Cyber model variant. The company also introduced an updated Agents SDK, enterprise AI initiatives, and a Child Safety Blueprint with a new Open

items.title: The Walt Disney Company and OpenAI reach landmark agreement to bring beloved characters to Sora
items.author: openai.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been highly active on Twitter/X in April 2026, with several major announcements. Most notably, OpenAI raised $122 billion in new funding to accelerate frontier AI development, expand global compute infrastructure, and meet surging demand for ChatGPT, Codex, and enterprise AI products. Additionally, OpenAI and Microsoft issued a joint statement, and OpenAI deepened its collaboration with the U.S. Department of Energy. The company also struck a landmark deal with The Walt Disney Company

items.title: openai-python CHANGELOG.md · GitHub
items.author: github.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has continued its rapid API evolution in early 2026, with the most significant structural change being the planned sunset of the Assistants API in favor of the newer Responses API. OpenAI announced that all Assistants API features will be migrated to the Responses API before deprecation, with the sunset expected later in 2026. The Responses API also received new capabilities including server-side compaction and Skills support, positioning it as the primary developer interface going forwar
